principles: Dashboard zeigt Tageslage aus data/YYYY-MM-DD/findings.json, nicht nur Run-Delta.
Emergency RSS writer ist Fallback, nicht Lagebild.
Einzelne Quellenfehler begrenzen Coverage, brechen aber nicht den Feed.

new_findings.title: Ecosystem Roundup: MoneyHero’s turnaround story has an uninvited co-author
new_findings.source: e27 Asia Startup and Tech Feed
new_findings.summary: MoneyHero’s Q1 2026 results tell two stories at once. The first is a genuine turnaround: revenue up, user growth holding, and a business that has quietly rebuilt its fundamentals after a bruising post-SPAC period.
